headline: CONTROLLED DRUGS, FULLY ACCOUNTABLE
subheading: Master safe custody, CD registers and secure transport to keep every Schedule inspection-ready.
flux_prompt: An abstract editorial composition evoking secure controlled-drugs distribution and supply-chain accountability in UK pharmaceutical compliance. A precision-engineered stainless-steel secure cabinet motif rendered as clean geometric volumes, its door subtly ajar to reveal softly glowing teal interior shelving, set against a deep navy environment. A luminous cyan chain of light links abstract storage, transport and delivery nodes across the frame, suggesting an unbroken traceability trail and chain of custody. Translucent layered glass planes imply temperature-controlled cold-chain containers, with a single subtle green accent light marking a verified checkpoint. Floating brushed-metal padlock and key forms dissolve into soft bokeh, conveying restricted access, security and quiet control. Cool clinical-luxury lighting, premium minimal surfaces, calm navy-teal depth-of-field blur, refined high-end pharmaceutical mood. 1500x900 composition, 5:3 aspect ratio, professional editorial illustration, premium quality, clean composition, modern visual storytelling, professional lighting, no text, no watermark, no logo, ultra detailed
